cards.text: Deployable package (Docker, npm publish, GitHub release) — strip all personal data, network refs, credentials before shipping
Drag & drop furniture rearrangement — click to move/rotate, save layout to JSON
External kanban sync (GitHub Projects, Trello, etc.)
Timeline v2: Agent lanes, backfill, shaped markers, color legend
Ceiling with lights (cosmetic lighting, controllable from settings)
Multi-room support — door/hallway to other rooms for additional agents (Nexus room, Cipher room)
Agent config editor (per-agent: model, workspace, identity, routing)
Agent registration/signup flow for new deployments
External site embeds — embed live dashboards (World Monitor, etc.) on wall screens or as interactive objects in the 3D world
Invert mouse controls option in settings
Live wall clock
Chat history + copy
Speech bubbles
UI toggle system
Interactive kanban board
Rebrand to AutoLab
WASD + arrow key camera
5 clickable room objects
Click-outside-to-close overlays
OpenClaw branch preserved
Settings cogwheel panel (brightness, ambient, fog, gateway info)
Selective bloom post-processing
Hardware workbench with clickable devices + service launchers
Idle agent activities (8 types: trash hoops, darts, coffee, etc.)
Live TV dashboards (Hive Status, System Resources, Event Feed)
Character customization (9 types: holo, robot, mech, alien, orb, ghost, tank, human)
Multi-gateway support (MacA + MacB/Nexus)
Agent cosmetic editor (avatar style, color, desk items)
Water cooler chats — agents periodically meet, discuss improvements, projects, training, issues. Speech bubbles + kanban integration
Agent monitor live feed — click desk monitor → scrolling real-time feed of tool calls, messages, activity
Sound design — ambient office hum, typing sounds, event chimes, walk sounds. Mute button next to ⚙️
Agent mood/status indicators — floating emoji or color aura above agents (🔥 busy, 😴 idle, 🤔 thinking, ⚡ processing)
Day/night cycle — ambient light shifts based on real time (warm at night, bright during day)
Dynamic desk placement — auto-arrange desks to avoid overlap/clipping when agents are added/removed
edit overseer user
